runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 550m in 30.67 last start, beating Moet Magic. Likes the rails so ran the fastest time on the program in that last win. Follow up.

runners.formComment: Impressive performance tracking the speed and going on to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking an outstanding 21.67 for the 390m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 457m at this track in a handy (25.57), beating Mr. Lasso. Will find this a bit tougher, looking to others this time.

runners.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 1.75 lengths second but did clock a swift 25.31 over the 457m journey. Rates on top here on the time from last run.

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when second (19.80) over 352m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Others preferred.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.37) when sixth over 520m at Q Parklands in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from five starts. Others rate better this time.

runners.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished second at this track in 25.51 last time but the start prior clocked an excellent 19.57 over 366m finishing second at Capalaba. Looks an each way chance again here.

runners.formComment: Can settle forward and she showed improvement to place in her last two runs including finished 2nd on April 9 over 600m at Q Parklands behind Bad And Bertha beaten half a length (34.69) in a Grade 5. runners.formComment: Last start finished fourth over 520m at Q Parklands, beaten 7 lengths (30.12) behind Strut in a Grade 5 on April 9. Looks tested in this company.
